project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi! Thanks for reaching out 
To make sure I point you to the right Pilates Reformer, could you tell me a bit about your plan?
 Is this for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 Roughly how many units are you considering?
 Which country will the machines be delivered to?

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
New studio 
10 units 
USA Texas

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Before I recommend the most suitable model for your studio, could I confirm two quick things:

 Do you prefer aluminum reformers or wood reformers?
 Are you looking for standard reformers or reformer with tower?

Once I know this, I can show you the models most studios choose for a 10-reformer setup and share photos and specifications with you.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi, thanks for the details 

A new studio with around 10 reformers is a very common setup. Many boutique studios in the U.S. choose aluminum commercial reformers because they’re very stable for high-frequency classes.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Aluminum reformer with no tower

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Yes please show me

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi, perfect 

For a 10-reformer studio setup, many studios in the U.S. choose aluminum commercial reformers.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Let me send you the photos and details so you can compare.
让我把照片和详细信息发给你，以便你可以比较。

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Here are two models that are very popular for studio use. I’ll show you the photos below.

Option 1 – AR011 (Most chosen for new studios)
Very stable aluminum frame, smooth carriage, and a clean studio look that many boutique studios prefer.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Option 2 – AR001 (More budget-friendly commercial model)
Also aluminum and very durable, often chosen by studios looking for a slightly lower investment.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: I really like the first one

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: What about a machine like this one

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Yes, the first one you liked is the AR011 aluminum reformer, which is one of the most popular models for new Pilates studios.

The machine in the video looks like a Megaformer (Lagree-style machine). It’s used for a different training style compared with a traditional Pilates reformer.

We actually also produce Megaformer machines. If you’re interested, I can send you some photos and details so you can take a look.

Many studios choose Reformers as the main equipment, and sometimes add a few Megaformers for Lagree-style classes.
是的，您喜欢的那一款是 AR011 铝制 reformer，它是新开设的 Pilates 工作室中最受欢迎的型号之一。

视频中的机器看起来像 Megaformer（Lagree 风格的机器）。它与传统 Pilates reformer 的训练方式不同。

实际上我们确实也生产 Megaformer 机器。如果您感兴趣，我可以发给您一些照片和详细信息供您参考。

许多工作室选择 Reformers 作为主要设备，有时会添加几台 Megaformers 用于 Lagree 风格的课程。

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Ok that’s good to know can you show me the megaformers 

I’m interested in ar011 they both had AR011

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
ic-videocam 视频This is the one I liked
这是我喜欢的那一个

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Or 8
或者 8

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Can you tell me the price for 10

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Or 8

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi, great choice — AR011 is one of the most popular aluminum reformers for new studios.

Here is the equipment price:

嗨，非常好的选择——AR011 是新型工作室中最受欢迎的铝制再生器之一。

以下是设备价格：

10 units: $1,137 per unit  
Total: $11,370

总计：$11,370

8 units: $1,207 per unit  
Total: $9,656

This is the machine price only.

If you’d like, I can also calculate the shipping cost to Texas for you.
Just send me the city or ZIP code, and I’ll check the delivery estimate.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
And I’ll also send you some Megaformer models so you can take a look as well.
我还会发给你一些 Megaformer 模型，你也可以看看。

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Houton Texas

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi, great — Houston is a major delivery city, so shipping is usually quite smooth.

Could you please send me the ZIP code as well?
That will allow me to calculate the exact shipping cost to your address.

For studio orders like 8–10 reformers, we usually arrange door-to-door delivery (DDP), which includes ocean freight, customs clearance, and delivery to your address.

Once I have the ZIP code, I’ll calculate the total landed cost for you.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Is there any warranty on the machined

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Do you offer payment plans?
你们提供分期付款吗？

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi, thanks for sending the ZIP code.

Yes, our machines come with a commercial warranty:

嗨，谢谢您发送邮编。

是的，我们的机器附带商业保修：

Frame: 2years
框架：2 年
Carriage & rails: 2years
导轨和滑轨：2 年
Springs and moving parts: 1 year
弹簧和活动部件：1 年

They are designed for high-frequency studio use, so they are very durable.

它们专为高频工作室使用而设计，因此非常耐用。

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
For payment, most studio orders are arranged like this:

对于付款，大多数工作室订单是这样安排的：

30% deposit to start production
30%预付款开始生产
70% balance before shipment
发货前支付 70%尾款

Production usually takes about 15–20 days, and then we arrange the shipment to Houston.

For delivery, we can arrange door-to-door shipping (DDP), which includes ocean freight, customs clearance, and delivery to your address.

生产通常需要 15-20 天，然后我们安排将货物运往休斯顿。

关于运输，我们可以安排门到门的运输（DDP），这包括海运、清关以及送货到您的地址。

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
I’ll now calculate the shipping cost to ZIP code 77044 and send you the full estimate for 8 and 10 AR011 reformers.
我现在将计算运送到邮编 77044 的运费，并将为您发送 8 英寸和 10 英寸 AR011 改革器的完整估价

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
My studio won’t be done until this fall how can I secure this pricing
我的工作室到今年秋天才能完工，我该如何锁定这个价格

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
If I order now I have no where to put them
如果我现在订购，就没有地方放它们

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi, that’s very common for new studios.

Many studio owners secure their equipment a few months before the opening, and we can help with that.

If you’d like to lock in the current pricing, you can place the order with the 30% deposit, and we can arrange delayed shipment closer to your opening date.

We can also hold the machines in our warehouse after production, so you don’t need to worry about storage.

When your studio is closer to completion, we can then arrange the shipment to Houston.

This way you can secure the current price and production slot, but receive the machines when you’re ready.
嗨，这对新工作室来说很常见。

许多工作室老板在开业前几个月就会采购设备，我们可以协助完成这项工作。

如果您希望锁定当前价格，可以通过支付 30%的定金下单，我们可以在您开业日期临近时安排延迟发货。

我们还可以在生产后将机器存放在我们的仓库中，这样您就不必担心存储问题。

当您的工作室接近完工时，我们可以安排将设备运往休斯顿。

这样您就可以锁定当前价格和生产时段，但在您准备好时再收到设备。

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Hi,

I checked the shipping cost for you.

For 8 units, the chargeable weight shipping cost is USD 1,889 in total.
For 10 units, the total shipping cost would be USD 2,325.

After the vessel departs, delivery and final pickup normally take around 35–40 days.

Also, if you would like to lock in the current product price, you can proceed with a 30% deposit now.
The shipping cost does not need to be paid at this stage — we can recalculate and confirm the freight again when the order is ready to ship.

Let me know if you would like me to prepare the PI for the deposit.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Hi, I’ve been thinking about your studio setup. Since your space won’t be ready until fall, I completely understand not wanting the machines delivered too early.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Do you already have a rough target month for when you’d want the AR011s to arrive in Houston? If you do, I can help you work backward from that and suggest the best timing.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: What many new studio owners do is simply reserve the production timing first, and then we match the shipment to the build-out progress later. That way, everything stays much easier on your side.

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Hi it will probably be late fall October

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
Domestic transport to forwarder warehouse: 3–4 days
国内运输至货运仓库：3-4 天
Waiting for vessel departure: 7–10 days
等待船只出发：7-10 天
Ocean shipping to the U.S.: 35–40 days
海运至美国：35-40 天
Customs clearance + final delivery: 10–15 days
清关+最终交付：10-15 天

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Perfect, October timing is very clear

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: Just to give you a clear timeline for planning:

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message:
So in total, the full lead time is around 55–70 days door-to-door.
所以总共，门到门的完整交货周期大约是 55-70 天。

messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
messages.message: That’s why for an October setup, planning the shipment around late August / early September works very smoothly.

me: Perfect, October timing is very clear
me: Just to give you a clear timeline for planning:
me: So in total, the full lead time is around 55–70 days door-to-door.
所以总共，门到门的完整交货周期大约是 55-70 天。
me: That’s why for an October setup, planning the shipment around late August / early September works very smoothly.

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
Hi, great — Houston is a major delivery city, so shipping is usually quite smooth.

Could you please send me the ZIP code as well?
That will allow me to calculate the exact shipping cost to your address.

For studio orders like 8–10 reformers, we usually arrange door-to-door delivery (DDP), which includes ocean freight, customs clearance, and delivery to your address.

Once I have the ZIP code, I’ll calculate the total landed cost for you.

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: Is there any warranty on the machined

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
Do you offer payment plans?
你们提供分期付款吗？

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
Hi, thanks for sending the ZIP code.

Yes, our machines come with a commercial warranty:

嗨，谢谢您发送邮编。

是的，我们的机器附带商业保修：

Frame: 2years
框架：2 年
Carriage & rails: 2years
导轨和滑轨：2 年
Springs and moving parts: 1 year
弹簧和活动部件：1 年

They are designed for high-frequency studio use, so they are very durable.

它们专为高频工作室使用而设计，因此非常耐用。

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
For payment, most studio orders are arranged like this:

对于付款，大多数工作室订单是这样安排的：

30% deposit to start production
30%预付款开始生产
70% balance before shipment
发货前支付 70%尾款

Production usually takes about 15–20 days, and then we arrange the shipment to Houston.

For delivery, we can arrange door-to-door shipping (DDP), which includes ocean freight, customs clearance, and delivery to your address.

生产通常需要 15-20 天，然后我们安排将货物运往休斯顿。

关于运输，我们可以安排门到门的运输（DDP），这包括海运、清关以及送货到您的地址。

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
I’ll now calculate the shipping cost to ZIP code 77044 and send you the full estimate for 8 and 10 AR011 reformers.
我现在将计算运送到邮编 77044 的运费，并将为您发送 8 英寸和 10 英寸 AR011 改革器的完整估价

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
My studio won’t be done until this fall how can I secure this pricing
我的工作室到今年秋天才能完工，我该如何锁定这个价格

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
If I order now I have no where to put them
如果我现在订购，就没有地方放它们

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
Hi, that’s very common for new studios.

Many studio owners secure their equipment a few months before the opening, and we can help with that.

If you’d like to lock in the current pricing, you can place the order with the 30% deposit, and we can arrange delayed shipment closer to your opening date.

We can also hold the machines in our warehouse after production, so you don’t need to worry about storage.

When your studio is closer to completion, we can then arrange the shipment to Houston.

This way you can secure the current price and production slot, but receive the machines when you’re ready.
嗨，这对新工作室来说很常见。

许多工作室老板在开业前几个月就会采购设备，我们可以协助完成这项工作。

如果您希望锁定当前价格，可以通过支付 30%的定金下单，我们可以在您开业日期临近时安排延迟发货。

我们还可以在生产后将机器存放在我们的仓库中，这样您就不必担心存储问题。

当您的工作室接近完工时，我们可以安排将设备运往休斯顿。

这样您就可以锁定当前价格和生产时段，但在您准备好时再收到设备。

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
Hi,

I checked the shipping cost for you.

For 8 units, the chargeable weight shipping cost is USD 1,889 in total.
For 10 units, the total shipping cost would be USD 2,325.

After the vessel departs, delivery and final pickup normally take around 35–40 days.

Also, if you would like to lock in the current product price, you can proceed with a 30% deposit now.
The shipping cost does not need to be paid at this stage — we can recalculate and confirm the freight again when the order is ready to ship.

Let me know if you would like me to prepare the PI for the deposit.

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: Hi, I’ve been thinking about your studio setup. Since your space won’t be ready until fall, I completely understand not wanting the machines delivered too early.

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: Do you already have a rough target month for when you’d want the AR011s to arrive in Houston? If you do, I can help you work backward from that and suggest the best timing.

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: What many new studio owners do is simply reserve the production timing first, and then we match the shipment to the build-out progress later. That way, everything stays much easier on your side.

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: Hi it will probably be late fall October

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
Domestic transport to forwarder warehouse: 3–4 days
国内运输至货运仓库：3-4 天
Waiting for vessel departure: 7–10 days
等待船只出发：7-10 天
Ocean shipping to the U.S.: 35–40 days
海运至美国：35-40 天
Customs clearance + final delivery: 10–15 days
清关+最终交付：10-15 天

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: Perfect, October timing is very clear

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: Just to give you a clear timeline for planning:

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message:
So in total, the full lead time is around 55–70 days door-to-door.
所以总共，门到门的完整交货周期大约是 55-70 天。

core_messages.project_key: Rocio美国10台AR011（26.3.16日）10月份左右开业
core_messages.message: That’s why for an October setup, planning the shipment around late August / early September works very smoothly.

seller_only_text:
Hi! Thanks for reaching out 
To make sure I point you to the right Pilates Reformer, could you tell me a bit about your plan?
 Is this for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 Roughly how many units are you considering?
 Which country will the machines be delivered to?
Before I recommend the most suitable model for your studio, could I confirm two quick things:

 Do you prefer aluminum reformers or wood reformers?
 Are you looking for standard reformers or reformer with tower?

Once I know this, I can show you the models most studios choose for a 10-reformer setup and share photos and specifications with you.
Hi, thanks for the details 

A new studio with around 10 reformers is a very common setup. Many boutique studios in the U.S. choose aluminum commercial reformers because they’re very stable for high-frequency classes.
Hi, perfect 

For a 10-reformer studio setup, many studios in the U.S. choose aluminum commercial reformers.
Let me send you the photos and details so you can compare.
让我把照片和详细信息发给你，以便你可以比较。
Here are two models that are very popular for studio use. I’ll show you the photos below.

Option 1 – AR011 (Most chosen for new studios)
Very stable aluminum frame, smooth carriage, and a clean studio look that many boutique studios prefer.
Option 2 – AR001 (More budget-friendly commercial model)
Also aluminum and very durable, often chosen by studios looking for a slightly lower investment.
Yes, the first one you liked is the AR011 aluminum reformer, which is one of the most popular models for new Pilates studios.

The machine in the video looks like a Megaformer (Lagree-style machine). It’s used for a different training style compared with a traditional Pilates reformer.

We actually also produce Megaformer machines. If you’re interested, I can send you some photos and details so you can take a look.

Many studios choose Reformers as the main equipment, and sometimes add a few Megaformers for Lagree-style classes.
是的，您喜欢的那一款是 AR011 铝制 reformer，它是新开设的 Pilates 工作室中最受欢迎的型号之一。

视频中的机器看起来像 Megaformer（Lagree 风格的机器）。它与传统 Pilates reformer 的训练方式不同。

实际上我们确实也生产 Megaformer 机器。如果您感兴趣，我可以发给您一些照片和详细信息供您参考。

许多工作室选择 Reformers 作为主要设备，有时会添加几台 Megaformers 用于 Lagree 风格的课程。

events.message: Do you already have a rough target month for when you’d want the AR011s to arrive in Houston? If you do, I can help you work backward from that and suggest the best timing.
What many new studio owners do is simply reserve the production timing first, and then we match the shipment to the build-out progress later. That way, everything stays much easier on your side.
Hi it will probably be late fall October

Domestic transport to forwarder warehouse: 3–4 days
国内运输至货运仓库：3-4 天
Waiting for vessel departure: 7–10 days
等待船只出发：7-10 天
Ocean shipping to the U.S.: 35–40 days
海运至美国：35-40 天
Customs clearance + final delivery: 10–15 days
清关+最终交付：10-15 天
Perfect, October timing is very clear
Just to give you a clear timeline for planning:

So in total, the full lead time is around 55–70 days door-to-door.
所以总共，门到门的完整交货周期大约是 55-70 天。
That’s why for an October setup, planning the shipment around late August / early September works very smoothly.
